name: Rock Paper Scissors
tagline: A game of rock, paper, scissors — on-chain, decentralized, and way more serious than it needs to be.
description: Tutorial track for building a decentralized rock-paper-scissors game on Polkadot. Start with a local-storage version and progressively turn it into a full product with Bulletin storage, an on-chain leaderboard, and P2P multiplayer over Statement Store.
